nasb.text: These are the names of the sons of Aaron, the anointed priests, whom he ordained to serve as priests.

esv.text: These are the names of the sons of Aaron, the anointed priests, whom he ordained to serve as priests.

cnv.text: 這就是亞倫的兒子的名字，他們是受膏的祭司，是摩西叫他們承受聖職擔任祭司的職分的。

ccb.text: 亚伦的儿子都是受膏的祭司，从摩西那里承受圣职做祭司。
